CustomField.description: Constant Contact contact_id (UUID) for this Contact. Stable external key the inbound poller uses to match CC records back to Salesforce (fallback = email). Populated from CC; also mapped into a CC custom field on the outbound native import. JSI-107 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Constant Contact's internal ID for this contact. Used to sync engagement, bounces, and opt-outs. Do not edit.
CustomField.label: Constant Contact ID
